rulings.Case Title: CLIFFORD HOLBROOK et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Dismiss Or Stay On Grounds Of Forum Non Conveniens
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MARCH 13, 2008 LINE 1. DEFENDANT BUCYRUS INTERNATIONAL, INC.'S Motion To Dismiss Or Stay On Grounds Of Forum Non Conveniens IS DENIED FOR FAILURE OF DEFENDANT TO DEMONSTRATE THAT MOST OF THE APPEARING DEFENDANTS, WHETHER THAT IS SIXTEEN OR FORTY-ONE, ARE SUBJECT TO JURISDICTION: ALTHOUGH DEFENDANT'S MOTION IS OTHERWISE COMPELLING, DEFENDANT MUST PROVIDE THE COURT WITH EVIDENCE THAT DEMONSTRATES THAT THE VAST MAJORITY OF DEFENDANTS ARE AMENABLE TO SERVICE IN UTAH TO MEET THE STANDARD IN HANSEN V OWENS CORNING (1996) 51 CAL APP 4TH 753. =(302/PJM/VC)
